productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Black Casual Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of mocassins from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this stylish mocassin makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Leather hem stitch detailing on the forefoot and a lacing system throughout the collar Padded footbed for all-day comfort Slip-on style for easy on/off High ankle for better support to the lower leg and style Outsole Durable textured rubber outsole with a raised heel for grip and ergonomic comfort shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
